ACC X73 v2

OBD Information

Baudrate:
Func Addr: 0B
Func Name: ACC

  {
    "minbytes": 18,
    "sentbytes": "21FD",
    "name": "RDBLID_ReadDynamicDataSPU",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "désalignement horizontal": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "désalignement vertical": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "plaus désalignement horizontal": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "plaus désalignement vertical": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

      "angle au volant": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "delta vitesse roues AR": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },
      "delta vitesse roues AV": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ESP désactivé": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "vitesse véhicule": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 19,
    "sentbytes": "21A0",

        "bitoffset": 4,

        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "couple résistant": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true
      },
      "état contacteur feu stop": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 16,
        "ref": true
      },
      "position interrupteur ACC": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 3,

      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      }

  },

        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"

        "ref": true
      },
      "patch SPU": {
        "firstbyte": 39,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 52,
        "ref": true
      },
      "revision-number SPU": {
        "firstbyte": 36,
        "ref": true
      },
      "serial number": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "version-number RPU": {
        "firstbyte": 50,
        "ref": true
      },
      "version-number SPU": {
        "firstbyte": 34,
        "ref": true
      },
      "year_production": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },

      },

      },

      }
    }
  },

        "bitoffset": 2,
        "endian": "Big"

        "bitoffset": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
